message.content:
**Title (Titolo):** GUCCI GG Jacquard Square Scarf
**Subtitle (Sottotitolo):** Luxurious Wool and Silk Blend Scarf in Anthracite
**Short Description (Breve Descrizione):** Elevate your style with this authentic GUCCI GG Jacquard Square Scarf, crafted from a luxurious blend of wool and silk. Featuring the iconic GG pattern in anthracite, this scarf is a timeless accessory for any fashion enthusiast. Perfect for adding a touch of sophistication to any outfit.

**Description (Descrizione):**

- **Model Number:** 281942 3G704 1062
- **Material:** 80% wool, 20% silk
- **Size:** 140 cm x 140 cm
- **Color:** Anthracite (dark gray)
- **Pattern:** Iconic GG Jacquard pattern
- **Origin:** Made in Italy
- **Condition:** New with tags
- **Authenticity:** 100% authentic GUCCI product
- **Features:**
  - Luxurious wool and silk blend for comfort and durability
  - Versatile square shape can be styled in multiple ways
  - Classic GG pattern adds a touch of sophistication to any outfit
  - Perfect accessory for both casual and formal occasions
  - Comes with original GUCCI tags and packaging for authenticity
- **Care Instructions:** To maintain the quality and longevity of your scarf, it is recommended to dry clean only. Avoid machine washing or ironing to prevent damage to the fabric.
